statement: Hyperscaler custom AI silicon (Google TPU Ironwood, AWS Trainium 3, Microsoft Maia 200, Meta MTIA 300/400) is expanding but remains captive to its creators and unavailable for external rental.
why: Growing captive hyperscaler ASIC deployment displaces some internal merchant-GPU demand, though captivity limits it as open-market supply.

impact.mechanism: Hyperscalers shifting internal workloads to captive ASICs reduces their incremental merchant-GPU demand.

evidence.source: Spheron Blog - Hyperscaler Custom AI Chips 2026 (competitive structure / S9)
evidence.excerpt: All four chips are captive to their creators and unavailable for external rental.
